handle() - Method in class io.goobi.viewer.exceptions.MyExceptionHandler

Finds the appropriate MessageHandler for a message, lets the handler handle the message and update the message in the database.
handleAutocomplete() - Method in class io.goobi.viewer.faces.components.Autocomplete
Retrieves the request parameter 'term' from a commandscript call and return the result of a call to the method given in attribute 'items'.

handleException(EntityManager) - Method in interface io.goobi.viewer.dao.IDAO
Handling of exceptions occurred during IDAO.commitTransaction(EntityManager) Usually calls EntityTransaction.rollback() on the current transaction of the given EntityManager.

Handling of exceptions occurred during IDAO.commitTransaction(EntityManager) Usually calls EntityTransaction.rollback() on the current transaction of the given EntityManager.

HierarchicalBrowseDcElement - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.collections
Represents a node in the collection browse hierarchy with child elements, hit counts, and display metadata.
HierarchicalBrowseDcElement(HierarchicalBrowseDcElement) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.collections.HierarchicalBrowseDcElement
Creates a new HierarchicalBrowseDcElement instance.
HierarchicalBrowseDcElement(String, long, String, String, String, int) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.collections.HierarchicalBrowseDcElement
Creates a new HierarchicalBrowseDcElement instance.
HIERARCHICALFIELD - Enum constant in enum class io.goobi.viewer.model.metadata.MetadataParameter.MetadataParameterType
 
hierarchy - Variable in class io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.CompoundLabeledLink
 
Highlight - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.cms
Wraps a HighlightData entity to provide a view-layer object for a highlighted content item, including thumbnail generation, metadata loading, and multilingual label support.
Highlight(HighlightData) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.Highlight
 
Highlight(HighlightData, ThumbnailHandler, Configuration) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.Highlight
 
HighlightData - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.cms
JPA entity storing the persistent configuration for a highlighted content item, including its name, display date range, enabled state, target type, and associated media.
HighlightData() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.HighlightData
 
HighlightData.ImageMode - Enum Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.cms
Enumerates the strategies for selecting the image displayed alongside a highlight entry: no image, an explicitly uploaded image, or the representative thumbnail of the associated record.
HighlightData.TargetType - Enum Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.cms
Enumerates the possible targets of a highlight entry, either a catalogued record identified by a persistent identifier or an arbitrary URL.
HighlightsBean - Class in io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans
Managed bean handling Highlight objects.
HighlightsBean() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans.HighlightsBean
Empty defaul constructor.
HighlightsBean(IDAO, NavigationHelper, ImageDeliveryBean) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans.HighlightsBean
Testing constructor explicitly initializing required properties.
HighlightsBean.EditStatus - Enum Class in io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans
Status of editing the selected highlight in the administration backend.
HitListView - Enum Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.search
Enumerates the available display modes for a search result list: DETAILS shows full detail cards, TILES shows a tile/grid layout, and LIST shows a compact list.
hits - Variable in class io.goobi.viewer.model.calendar.AbstractCalendarItem
 
HitType - Enum Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.search
Classifies a search hit by the type of Solr document it originates from, such as a record, structure element, metadata group, user-generated content entry, or CMS page.
homePage() - Method in class io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans.NavigationHelper
homePage.
HTML - Enum constant in enum class io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.legacy.CMSContentItemType

Tools for parsing html.
HtmlScriptValidator - Class in io.goobi.viewer.faces.validators
Validates that any input text has no "script" tags.
HtmlScriptValidator() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.faces.validators.HtmlScriptValidator
 
HtmlSidebarWidget - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.widgets
A subtype of CustomSidebarWidget to display a html text in different languages.

HtmlTagValidator - Class in io.goobi.viewer.faces.validators
Validates that any input text has no html-tags other than <br>, <b>, <strong>, <em>, <i>, <mark>, <small>, <del>, <ins>, <sub>, <sup>.

Thrown when an HTTP request returns an unexpected or error response code.

HttpHeaderProvider - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.security.authentication
Authentication provider that authenticates users by reading a user identifier from an HTTP request header (or parameter), then looking up or creating the corresponding User account.

Encodes responses into UTF-8 and prevents proxy caching.
